categories.name: Moderation
categories.description: Keep your server safe with advanced moderation commands.

commands.name: ban
commands.description:
Bans a user from the server.
You can also ban from ID to ban regardless whether they're
in the server or not.
In order for this to work, the bot must have Ban Member permissions.
To use this command you must have Ban Members permission.

commands.name: clear
commands.description:
Clears the mentioned amount of messages.
If an amount is not mentioned then amount is considered as 10
If a member is mentioned, then it clears that member's messages only.
Pinned messages are not cleared by default. Use `-p` flag to clear them

commands.name: clearpunish
commands.description:
Clears a users punish if a user is mentioned.
Else it will clear entire server warns

commands.name: clearwarn
commands.description:
Clears a users warn if a user is mentioned.
Else it will clear entire server warns

commands.name: jail
commands.description:
Jail users so they can only send messages in #Jailed channel
If you want to temporarily jail someone, mention time after mentioning the member.
Note that times are in UTC.
Mutes stay even if they leave and rejoin.
Please note that servers with custom member roles that give permissions to talk will no work due to permission overwriting

The bot must have Manage Roles permission and be
above the Jailed role in the hierarchy.

To use this command you need to be higher than the
mute role in the hierarchy and have Manage Roles
permission at the server level.

commands.name: jailrole
commands.description: Configure Jail Role

commands.name: jailrole update
commands.description:
Updates Permissions of jailrole for every channel.

**Note: **This command has cooldown of 3 minutes because of heavy ratelimits by Discord.

commands.name: jailrole set
commands.description: Set jailrole to an existing role

commands.name: jailrole remove
commands.description:
Remove jailrole, so that Roku don't use the jailrole anymore.
**Note: ** If you tried to jail someone after removing jailrole, roku will create new role.
Due to this, this command has cooldown of 3 minutes

commands.name: jailrole auto
commands.description:
Enable auto permission update for jailrole.

This will make bot update jailrole permission when
a new channel is created

commands.name: kick
commands.description:
Kicks a mentioned member from the server.
In order for this to work, the bot must have Kick Member permissions.
To use this command you must have Kick Members permission.

commands.name: mute
commands.description:
Mute users so they can no longer talk.
If you want to temporarily mute someone, use time after mentioning the member.
Note that times are in UTC.
Mutes stay even if they leave and rejoin.
Please note that servers with custom member roles that give permissions to talk will no work due to permission overwriting

The bot must have Manage Roles permission and be
above the muted role in the hierarchy.

To use this command you need to be higher than the
mute role in the hierarchy and have Manage Roles
permission at the server level.

commands.name: muterole
commands.description: Configure Mute Role

commands.name: muterole auto
commands.description:
Enable auto permission update for muterole.

This will make bot update muterole permission when
a new channel is created

commands.name: muterole remove
commands.description:
Remove muterole, so that Roku don't use the muterole anymore.
**Note: ** If you mute someone after removing muterole, roku will create new muterole.
Due to this, this command has cooldown of 3 minutes

commands.name: muterole update
commands.description:
Updates Permissions of muterole for every channel.

**Note: **This command has cooldown of 3 minutes because of heavy ratelimits by Discord.

commands.name: muterole set
commands.description: Set muterole to an existing role

commands.name: punishments
commands.description:
See the past punishment history of a user in the server or the entire server at once.
Only counts punishments given out through Roku

commands.name: removepunish
commands.description: Removes the punishment with given case.

commands.name: removewarn
commands.description: Removes the warning with given case.

commands.name: slowmode
commands.description:
Changes the slowmode of given channel.
If channel is not given, changes the slowmode of channel where command is run.
Time format 2 h, 3 m, 2 s.
Eg: `ro slowmode 10s`

**Note: ** To turn off slowmode, type `ro slowmode 0s`

commands.name: unban
commands.description:
Unbans a member from the server.
You can pass either the ID of the banned member or the Name#Discrim
combination of the member. Typically the ID is easiest to use.
In order for this to work, the bot must have Ban Member permissions.
To use this command you must have Ban Members permissions.

commands.name: warn
commands.description:
Warns a member in the server
You can pass either ID or nickname or name#discrimin combination
To use this command, you must have Manage Server permissions.
You can check warns through `<prefix>punishments <member>`.

commands.name: warnings
commands.description: See a specific user's warnings or just all warnings on the entire server

categories.name: Automation
categories.description: Automatically do things, like welcome messages, disboard notifications and autoroles

commands.name: autorole
commands.description: Setup which role I should give automatically to users and bots when they join the server.

commands.name: autorole all
commands.description:
Adds roles to all users on joining the server.
If Member Screening is Enabled, Roles are only given after they are verified (pass member screening).
This can be used along with bot.

commands.name: autorole none
commands.description: Removes autorole for everyone.

commands.name: autorole show
commands.description: Shows the full list of autoroles that are currently setup

commands.name: autorole delay
commands.description:
To make roku wait few seconds before adding roles.
This makes roku wait before giving out roles

commands.name: autorole bot
commands.description: Adds roles to bot users on joining the server.

commands.name: autorole human
commands.description:
Adds roles to human users on joining the server.
If Member Screening is Enabled,
Roles are only given after they are verified (pass member screening).

commands.name: disboard
commands.description: Help to setup disboard notifications

commands.name: disboard disable
commands.description:
Disables disbord notifications system
To turn it on, you need to set from begining again!

commands.name: disboard channel
commands.description:
Sets the disboardchannel.
If channel is not mentioned , channel will be set to the channel where the command is used.

commands.name: disboard test
commands.description: Test your Disboard Message Setup

commands.name: disboard message
commands.description: Sets the disboard bump message.

commands.name: goodbye
commands.description: Help to setup your goodbye system in a completely customizable way

commands.name: goodbye message
commands.description:
Sets goodbye message or embed
You can use embed builder from https://embedbuilder.nadekobot.me/

commands.name: goodbye test
commands.description:
Test your goodbye setup!
Actually this emits a fake join event.

commands.name: goodbye text
commands.description: Sets the text message outside embed.

commands.name: goodbye channel
commands.description:
Sets the goodbye channel.
If channel is not mentioned , channel will be set to the channel where the command is used.

commands.name: goodbye disable
commands.description:
Turns goodbye system off
To turn it on, you need to set from begining again!

commands.name: goodbye embed
commands.description: Goodbye embed

commands.name: goodbye image
commands.description: Configure the Goodbye Images

commands.name: goodbye bind
commands.description: Sets up the goodbye instantly

commands.name: welcome
commands.description: Help to setup your welcome  in a completely customizable way

commands.name: welcome image
commands.description: Configure the welcome images

commands.name: welcome test
commands.description:
Test your welcome setup!
Actually this emits a fake join event.

commands.name: welcome disable
commands.description:
Disables welcome messages
To turn it on, you need to set from begining again!

commands.name: welcome bind
commands.description: Sets up the welcome instantly

commands.name: welcome channel
commands.description:
Sets the welcome channel.
If channel is not mentioned , channel will be set to the channel where the command is used.

commands.name: welcome message
commands.description:
Sets welcome message or embed
You can use embed builder from https://embedbuilder.nadekobot.me/

commands.name: welcome text
commands.description: Sets the text message outside embed.

commands.name: welcome embed
commands.description: Welcome embed

categories.name: Leveling
categories.description:
Reward members for talking with xp and even give roles at milestones
**To enable leveling, use `ro enable leveling` command.**

commands.name: givelevel
commands.description: Adds Level to the mentioned user

commands.name: levelchannel
commands.description: Set where I should send leveling messages

commands.name: levelchannel default
commands.description:
Makes Roku send levelup messages where they levelup
This is the default

commands.name: levellb
commands.description: Shows server level (rank) leaderboard

commands.name: levelmessage
commands.description: Setup Custom levelmessage for your lovely server!

commands.name: levelrole
commands.description: Settings for auto level roles

commands.name: levelrole list
commands.description: Shows the levelroles that you have added

commands.name: levelrole add
commands.description: Set roles I should give out to people when they level up to a specific level

commands.name: levelrole remove
commands.description: No description provided.

commands.name: leveltest
commands.description:
Test Your LevelMessage Setup!
You need to have role rewardonly disabled for this to work.
If u have enabled role rewardonly, please use `rewardtest` command.

commands.name: noxpchannels
commands.description:
Disable channels from giving xp for chatting in it.
Incase if u dont want ppl to spam in #spam or #bots channel.

commands.name: rank
commands.description:
Shows the server level, xp and rank of mentioned member
If member is not mentioned, shows authors level, rank and xp.

commands.name: resetlevels
commands.description:
Reset the level of entire server.
Only Server Owner can do this and this cannot be undone

commands.name: rewardonly
commands.description: Make roku only send role reward messages.

commands.name: rewardstyle
commands.description:
Change how levelroles get given out.
**Stack: ** When leveling up, users keep their previous levels
**Replace: ** When leveling up, users only keep their highest role.

commands.name: rolerewardmessage
commands.description: Setup Custom role reward message for your lovely server!

commands.name: rolerewardtest
commands.description: Test Your Reward Message Setup!

commands.name: xpchannels
commands.description:
Enable a previously disabled channel from giving xp for chatting in it.
Incase u dont want ppl to spam in #spam or #bots channel.

categories.name: Fun
categories.description: Have a good laugh with everyone in the server

commands.name: 8ball
commands.description:
8ball command
**Disclaimer:** Don't rely on bots response. Its just random

commands.name: charcoal
commands.description: Gives Charcoal effect your profile picture

commands.name: drake
commands.description: Helps u make anime drake meme in an interactive way

commands.name: husbando
commands.description:
Husband rating Device
Shows how much of a cool husband you can be!

commands.name: magik
commands.description:
Magik filter of avatar
If user is not mentioned, shows the avatar of the person who used the command

**Powered by Nekobot.xyz**

commands.name: match
commands.description: Shows the love between 2 persons.

commands.name: meme
commands.description: Brings random meme from reddit

commands.name: pfpcolors
commands.description: Shows 5 dominant colors of your profile picture

commands.name: pp
commands.description:
Checks pp size of mentioned member.
If user is not mentioned, this will show author's pp size

commands.name: quote
commands.description:
Make people say stuff
Fake chat screenshot image

commands.name: rizz
commands.description:
Check rizz of mentioned member.
If user is not mentioned, this will show author's rizz

commands.name: stone
commands.description: Turns you into a stone

commands.name: tinder
commands.description: Creates a tinder matching profile of two mentioned user

commands.name: trash
commands.description:
Shows the mention person as trash,
It's a fun command , so don't take it seriously

commands.name: trigger
commands.description: Triggers the User

commands.name: tti
commands.description:
Converts your text into some cool images

Powered by FlamingText

commands.name: waifu
commands.description:
Waifu rating Device
Shows how much of a sweet waifu you can be!

commands.name: wanted
commands.description:
Creates a wanted poster of mentioned user with a random price
If a user is not mentioned, create wanted poster of you

commands.name: who
commands.description:
We have seen magic mirror in many story books where it tells u who is the most beautiful person in this world,
Sameway here Roku will act as the magic mirror and u can ask any question like `ro who is most beautiful person this server.`
And it will who is the one among you.

categories.description:
Nothing much, Work In Progress
Suggestions and Ideas are welcomed

commands.name: tictactoe
commands.description: Starts a tic-tac-toe game with yourself.

categories.name: Config
categories.description: Configure some of my settings for your server

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disable a command in ur server

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Enable a command in your server

commands.name: locale
commands.description: Allows you to set to a different locale (language)

commands.name: locale server
commands.description: Allows you to set to a different locale (language) for your server

commands.name: prefix
commands.description: Manages the server Prefix

commands.name: prefix show
commands.description: Shows the Current Prefixes of this server.

commands.name: prefix enable
commands.description:
Enable message commands that runs with prefix.
By default this is enabled in your server

commands.name: prefix remove
commands.description: Removes a previously added prefix from Roku

commands.name: prefix add
commands.description: Adds a new prefix to Roku

commands.name: prefix clear
commands.description:
Clears all previously added prefix from Roku
This change will make roku use the defaul prefix within it.

commands.name: setprefix
commands.description:
Sets the prefix of the bot.
This is more like adding a single prefix along with default prefixes.
If u want more control over prefix, use the `prefix` and its subcommands.

categories.name: Giveaway
categories.description: Organize fun and highly customizable giveaways for your server

commands.name: gend
commands.description:
Ends the Giveaway
You need to pass message ID of the giveaway
You can also refer (reply) to giveaway embed to end that particular giveaway
If message ID , link or reference is not given, then it ends the last giveaway event.

commands.name: groll
commands.description:
Reroll the Giveaway.
You need to pass message ID of the giveaway
You can also refer (reply) to giveaway embed to end that particular giveaway
If message ID , link or reference is not given, then it ends the last giveaway event.

commands.name: gstart
commands.description: Start a quick Giveaway

commands.description:
Create Reaction roles in an interactive way.
Embeds that are created by Roku can be edited using `ro embed edit`

commands.name: reactionrole delete
commands.description:
Delete a reaction role with given ID

You can pass message ID or message link.
This will also delete the reaction menu

commands.name: reactionrole create
commands.description:
Create Reaction roles in an interactive way.
Embeds that are created by Roku can be edited using `ro embed edit`

commands.name: aq

commands.name: calculate
commands.description:
Add, Subract, Multiply and Divide Numbers.
Usage examples:
1. Addition - `Ro calc 3 + 5`
2. subraction - `Ro calc 5 - 3`
3. Multiplication - `Ro calc 3 x 5` or `Ro calc 3*5`
4. Division - `Ro calc 20 / 5`or `Ro calc 0 ÷ 5`
